steps.title: Find what explains the long journey
steps.content:
The passage creates a causal relationship: “Because Xoconochco's location within the empire was so ______, cacao and other trade goods produced there could reach the capital only after a long overland journey.” The blank must name a property of the location that explains why a long journey was necessary.

Given that Xoconochco is hundreds of kilometers southeast of the capital, the word must describe what about this far location makes travel time lengthy.

steps.title: Choose the word describing a distant location
steps.content:
“Peripheral” means at the edge or fringe of the empire, directly explaining why goods from Xoconochco needed a long overland journey to reach the capital.

The other three describe unrelated qualities (inconspicuousness, concealment, or approximation) that don't account for geographic distance.

This is the correct answer.
